description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a compact, ergonomic frame. The slide is streamlined with subtle serrations for grip, and the frame features a textured grip designed for secure handling. The trigger guard is rounded and slightly undercut, providing space for a comfortable grip and improved control. The barrel is short and flush with the slide, lacking any visible threading or compensator. There are no visible manufacturer markings, engravings, or decorative elements on the slide or frame. The magazine base is flat and integrated seamlessly with the grip, without any extensions or finger rests.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured grip, streamlined slide, and flat magazine base.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the rear, showing the back of the slide and grip, with the magazine base visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full profile, including the textured grip, trigger guard, slide serrations, and accessory rail under the barrel.
description_view_2: The front view displays the muzzle opening, front sight, and the width of the slide and frame.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the grip, trigger guard, slide, and barrel profile.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with ergonomic shaping, featuring a textured surface that appears stippled or lightly checkered for enhanced traction. It is constructed from a matte polymer material, providing a non-slip feel. The grip is slightly flared at the base for stability, with subtle finger grooves for comfort, but no visible logos or embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a gentle undercut at the rear to allow for a higher grip. It is smooth with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and its size is proportionate to the frame, offering ample space for finger placement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the front of the slide, with a standard round profile and no visible threading, ports, or compensators. The exterior is finished in matte black, matching the slide, and lacks any visible markings.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with only functional serrations at the rear for grip.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the grip, lacking any extension, bevel, or finger rest. It is simple in design, with no visible logos, texturing, or embellishments.
